Faculty of Engineering and Natural Sciences

Tabeloo

MENU

Tabeloo is an AI-powered digital platform developed by the Faculty of Engineering and Natural Sciences at Istanbul Okan University for its faculty students.

Tabeloo’s motto is “Ask Tabeloo, It knows!

”

.

At the center of the platform is TabelooGPT, an intelligent assistant that allows students to instantly ask questions and receive smart responses about topics related to faculty and university life. Students can quickly access information about administrative procedures, courses, internships, academic processes, and campus life in a simple and efficient way.

The platform also integrates several modules such as mobility, announcements, and frequently asked questions, bringing together essential information in a single centralized system. Students can easily access practical information including city transportation, campus charging stations, and bus and shuttle departure schedules. In addition, they can directly share their feedback and suggestions with the Faculty through the platform.

In short, Tabeloo is not just a website; it is an AI-based digital campus platform where students can ask questions, access information, follow opportunities, and manage their university experience in a smarter and more connected way.

Click for the Tabeloo.
